items.name_en: Intro ✨ GG Marmont Chain Mini Bag, includes card holder, can be attached to a larger bag. Features a structured yet soft silhouette with a flap closure and GG metal hardware. Inspired by 70s classic design. Made of quilted leather.

items.name_en: Iron Grey (Export Product) OHANEL🚩🚩🚩25k Large Diamond Quilted Calfskin LP Box Tongue Tongue Bag Black Gold! Play with the new LP Box bag large diamond quilted version🌟🌟 Very classic and atmospheric, the front double C logo is eye-catching and exquisite, calfskin material is not delicate at all!! The handle has texture, and the chain back adds a casual elegance. Easily adapts to different styles, can hold daily small items, turning heads when worn~ A definite fashion item✓Size: 17x19.5x5cm

Drawstring design gives the bag a natural, premium ruffled look
Metal chain bag
Naturally exudes a relaxed, chic, lazy vibe
Unique fanny bag shape with attitude
Extra-large capacity, fits a laptop
Perfect for work and daily use 👍 Can be used as a tote

items.name_en: Kelly Elan 27cm 89 Black Silver Hardware
items.name_cn:
Kelly Elan 27cm 89 Black Silver Hardware
The first true Kelly in the family, with no flaws in capacity, thickness, or shoulder strap length. A bag with a very high daily usage rate~
A graceful slender silhouette, paired with lambskin and black-silver for a full vintage vibe, with perfect storage. The shoulder strap length is very nice for the underarm carry!
